name: Reports - Freight Report
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Freight Report displays a list of sales with Freight charges in POS, including a Delivery Due Date (if specified)."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
A series of Filters are available to help narrow the sales down, including delivery mode (Fulfilment Method - e.g. home delivery, store pickup etc), Order Status, and Outlet."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphQSEAY.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphQSEAY.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "39097fde9a568b22dc9d282ebeaf01fc9332352eae5c39de0006f6c623917c63.png", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the Freight Report:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Reports > Sales Reports > Freight Report", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Filters", "bold": true}, {"text": " as required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The results will be displayed"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "amounts displayed inside brackets () are negative amounts."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To "}, {"text": "export ", "bold": true}, {"text": "report click the "}, {"text": "Save ", "bold": true}, {"text": "icon and select the preferred Output Method"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphQwEAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphQwEAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-09T224809.457.png", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]
